name: Slurm Job Dependency Chain
summary: Chain multi-stage Slurm jobs with explicit dependencies.
description: This skill helps users plan and optionally submit small Slurm dependency chains for preprocessing, analysis, and postprocessing stages using afterok, afterany, and singleton patterns.

inputs.name: stage_scripts
inputs.description: Batch scripts for each stage, or generated demo scripts from the example.

inputs.name: dependency_policy
inputs.description: Dependency type such as afterok for success-only continuation or afterany for cleanup/reporting.

outputs.name: dependency_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable sbatch commands showing stage order and dependency ids.

outputs.name: submitted_job_ids
outputs.description: Job ids for each stage when the user explicitly submits the demo chain.

outputs.name: stage_logs
outputs.description: Separate Slurm logs for each dependency stage.

examples.title: Plan or submit a three-stage dependency chain

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Generate a dependency plan without submitting jobs.
Run with --submit on a short test partition and confirm the later stages remain pending until dependencies are satisfied.
